validation.summary: Migrations, adapters, point-in-time views, source coverage, and restore-manifest verification exist in public source and are covered by tests.
The one-shot evidence runner produces a dry-run execution plan and will fail fast across receipt, readiness, source restore, model benchmark, embedding benchmark, and recovery gates.
No real Radeon Cloud receipt or live loopback model/embedding benchmark has been captured for this candidate.
Sprint 11 must not start until independent validation records the real Radeon runtime artifacts and this closure candidate is promoted to a review-bound close receipt.
The close-receipt promoter is fail-closed and rejects missing rollback, missing real Radeon gates, pre-authorized candidates, and review artifacts outside the Sprint 10 review folder.
